verses.text: Knowing His hour was come, 'having loved his own... he loved them unto the end.' Constant love. His love held firm to the very last.
Knowing His hour was come, 'having loved his own... he loved them unto the end.' Constant love. His love held firm to the very last.
Knowing His hour was come, 'having loved his own... he loved them unto the end.' Constant love. His love held firm to the very last.
He rises, girds a towel, and washes the disciples' feet. Lowly service. The Lord stoops to the task of a slave.
He rises, girds a towel, and washes the disciples' feet. Lowly service. The Lord stoops to the task of a slave.
Peter protests; 'If I wash thee not, thou hast no part with me'; Lord, not my feet only. Cleansing needful. None can share with Christ unwashed by Him.
Peter protests; 'If I wash thee not, thou hast no part with me'; Lord, not my feet only. Cleansing needful. None can share with Christ unwashed by Him.
Peter protests; 'If I wash thee not, thou hast no part with me'; Lord, not my feet only. Cleansing needful. None can share with Christ unwashed by Him.
Peter protests; 'If I wash thee not, thou hast no part with me'; Lord, not my feet only. Cleansing needful. None can share with Christ unwashed by Him.
He that is washed needs but to wash his feet; ye are clean, but not all. The traitor known. He marks Judas even amid the supper.
He that is washed needs but to wash his feet; ye are clean, but not all. The traitor known. He marks Judas even amid the supper.
If I, your Lord, have washed your feet, 'ye also ought to wash one another's feet.' An example set. He bids His own serve in humility.
If I, your Lord, have washed your feet, 'ye also ought to wash one another's feet.' An example set. He bids His own serve in humility.
If I, your Lord, have washed your feet, 'ye also ought to wash one another's feet.' An example set. He bids His own serve in humility.
If I, your Lord, have washed your feet, 'ye also ought to wash one another's feet.' An example set. He bids His own serve in humility.
The servant is not above his lord; 'happy are ye if ye do them.' Blessing in doing. Knowing is empty without obeying.
The servant is not above his lord; 'happy are ye if ye do them.' Blessing in doing. Knowing is empty without obeying.
He that ate bread with Me lifted his heel against Me; he that receives Me receives the Father. Betrayal foretold. Even treachery fulfils the Scripture.
He that ate bread with Me lifted his heel against Me; he that receives Me receives the Father. Betrayal foretold. Even treachery fulfils the Scripture.
He that ate bread with Me lifted his heel against Me; he that receives Me receives the Father. Betrayal foretold. Even treachery fulfils the Scripture.
Troubled, 'One of you shall betray me'; they ask who; John leans on His breast. Searching word. The warning stirs each heart.
Troubled, 'One of you shall betray me'; they ask who; John leans on His breast. Searching word. The warning stirs each heart.
Troubled, 'One of you shall betray me'; they ask who; John leans on His breast. Searching word. The warning stirs each heart.
Troubled, 'One of you shall betray me'; they ask who; John leans on His breast. Searching word. The warning stirs each heart.
Troubled, 'One of you shall betray me'; they ask who; John leans on His breast. Searching word. The warning stirs each heart.
He gives the sop to Judas; Satan enters him; 'That thou doest, do quickly.' The die cast. The traitor goes to his dark work.
He gives the sop to Judas; Satan enters him; 'That thou doest, do quickly.' The die cast. The traitor goes to his dark work.
None knew why; Judas went out, 'and it was night.' Fitting darkness. He leaves the light for the night of his sin.
None knew why; Judas went out, 'and it was night.' Fitting darkness. He leaves the light for the night of his sin.
None knew why; Judas went out, 'and it was night.' Fitting darkness. He leaves the light for the night of his sin.
'Now is the Son of man glorified, and God is glorified in him.' Glory in the cross. His coming death is His exaltation.
'Now is the Son of man glorified, and God is glorified in him.' Glory in the cross. His coming death is His exaltation.
'A new commandment I give... That ye love one another'; by this all shall know ye are My disciples. The badge of love. Mutual love marks the followers of Christ.
'A new commandment I give... That ye love one another'; by this all shall know ye are My disciples. The badge of love. Mutual love marks the followers of Christ.
'A new commandment I give... That ye love one another'; by this all shall know ye are My disciples. The badge of love. Mutual love marks the followers of Christ.
Peter vows to lay down his life; 'the cock shall not crow, till thou hast denied me thrice.' Overconfidence. He trusts his own strength and will fall.
